title: anatherum virginicum subvar. reinoldii
intro: Anatherum virginicum subvar. reinoldii, also known as Eastern Indian Grass or American Aloe, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Anatherum virginicum subvar. reinoldii include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
